subcodes.first_line: O thou who sacrificest thyself in the path of the Beloved! Though thou art afflicted with separation from kindred and companions in the lands of exile, and art beset with hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جانفشان سبیل جانان هر چند در بلاد غربت بفرقت اهل و یاران مبتلا گشتی و مشقت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
